nasb.text: Then He *poured water into the basin, and began to wash the disciples’ feet and to wipe them with the towel with which He was girded.

esv.text: Then he poured water into a basin and began to wash the disciples’ feet and to wipe them with the towel that was wrapped around him.

cnv.text: 然後他倒了一盆水，洗門徒的腳，並且用束腰的手巾擦乾。

ccb.text: 然后倒了一盆水为门徒洗脚，用束在腰间的毛巾擦干。

csbs.text: 然后把水倒进盆里，开始洗门徒们的脚，又用束在腰上的布巾擦干。
